name: Abatement of First Tier Excise Taxes

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who inadvertently trigger excise taxes under chapters 42 (private foundations) or 43 (qualified plans) must correct the error and demonstrate reasonable cause to the IRS.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: First tier excise taxes (except self-dealing) can be abated if the taxpayer establishes that the taxable event was due to reasonable cause and not willful neglect, provided the event is corrected.
